skills.name: mcp-server-card
skills.description: MCP Server Card (SEP-1649) for the Wright AI Documentation Intelligence Platform. Exposes search_docs, get_function_doc, and list_undocumented tools.

skills.name: llms-txt
skills.description: llms.txt navigation file describing Wright AI's key pages, product, integrations, languages, and exclusive capabilities for AI crawlers.

skills.name: api-catalog
skills.description: RFC 9727 API catalog linking to the Wright AI REST API OpenAPI spec, documentation, and health endpoint.

skills.name: oauth-discovery
skills.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization server metadata (RFC 8414) with agent_auth block for agent registration and API key issuance.

skills.name: oauth-protected-resource
skills.description: OAuth Protected Resource Metadata (RFC 9728) describing the Wright AI API resource and its authorization server.

skills.name: auth-md
skills.description: Auth.md agent registration guide — how to obtain a wai_ API key and authenticate with the Wright AI API.

skills.name: content-signals
skills.description: Content Signals in robots.txt declaring ai-train=no, search=yes, ai-input=yes.
